title: tetragonia diptera
intro: Tetragonia diptera, also known as New Zealand spinach or kōkihi, is a perennial succulent plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Tetragonia diptera include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Tetragonia diptera include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
